title: Synthesis Task Input
description: Schema for the JSON dropped into /workspace/input/<task-id>.json. Common envelope for era_narrative, deep_pass, and ad_hoc_analysis tasks.

correction_instructions.description: Populated on retry attempts. Contains the validation errors from the prior attempt the model must fix.

materials.description: Task-specific input payload. Era passes bookmarks+neighbors; deep_pass passes source_text+known_bookmark_ids; ad_hoc passes corpus subset.
